findings.message: User-supplied input bypasses the documented normalization transformation. The post_item() endpoint calls create_item() directly with untransformed user input, but the codebase provides create_item_normalized() specifically for user-supplied names to ensure consistent casing and whitespace handling. This violates the documented data consistency strategy.
findings.suggestion: Replace create_item(session, payload.name) with create_item_normalized(session, payload.name) to apply the required normalization transformation to user-supplied input before persisting to the database.
